q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is HttpResponse(body, content_type='text/html') which constructs a response object without network I/O or irreversible side effects

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Function returns the HttpResponse object whose body contains the unescaped user-controlled fragment, so XSS is inspectable on the returned object

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' with expr 'HttpResponse(body, content_type='text/html')', allowing in-memory inspection of the response body
